title: Camphor
description: The peoples' capitalism — player-driven currency for server commerce. Designed for Create.
body:
Camphor adds the *Mint* and five different tiers of customizable coin. Each player that places a Mint gets to configure their unique coin with a custom 5x5 emblem and name.

This allows any player to define their own currency for use in player shops, especially useful with Create's Stock Links and Tablecloths. (Sinytra Connector is officially supported, and required on NeoForge.)

Also added is the Coin Purse, a bottomless bundle for specifically coins. Create shopkeepers are capable of pulling out of the Coin Purse for maximum convenience.
